channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Russia Breaks Ceasefire as Strikes Kill 1, Injure 19 Across Ukraine
item.description: Russian attacks during the declared three-day ceasefire killed one civilian and injured 19 others across Ukraine. Ukraine's Air Force intercepted all 27 drones, but fighting continued on the front lines with 147 combat clashes recorded.

item.title: 🇱🇻🚁 Latvian Defense Minister Resigns After Drone Incursions
item.description: Latvian Defense Minister Andris Spruds resigned after drones violated Latvia's airspace. Prime Minister Evika Silina requested his resignation, citing loss of trust.

item.title: 🇵🇱🔍 Poland Finds Military Spy Drone Near Russia's Kaliningrad Border
item.description: Poland's military police found what appears to be a military reconnaissance drone near the border with Russia's Kaliningrad exclave. The drone had no combat capabilities according to preliminary findings.

item.title: 🇹🇷🚀 Turkey Pursues Intercontinental Ballistic Missile Capability
item.description: Turkey has revealed development of a previously unknown intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM), raising major questions about Ankara's strategic ambitions and defense posture.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️🇮🇷 US F/A-18 Super Hornets Strike Iranian Tankers Running Hormuz Blockade
item.description: US Navy F/A-18 Super Hornets have been conducting strikes against Iranian tankers attempting to run the Strait of Hormuz blockade, using bombs dropped down smokestacks and 20mm cannon fire against vessels' rudders.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Rejects Iran Ceasefire Response as "Totally Unacceptable"
item.description: US President dismissed Iran's response to a US ceasefire proposal designed to end the war. The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments as oil prices jumped on the news.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia Breaches Three-Day Ukraine Ceasefire, Zelenskyy Says
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy accused Russia of violating a three-day ceasefire agreement, as Putin publicly suggested the conflict may be "coming to an end" while condemning Western support for Ukraine.

item.title: 🇬🇧🏥 British Paratroopers Land on Remote Island for Hantavirus Case
item.description: A specialist British military team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, one of the world's most remote inhabited islands, to treat a suspected hantavirus case. The operation highlights global health concerns as a cruise ship outbreak continues.

item.title: 🇱🇧⚔️ Medics Among 51 Killed in Israeli Attacks on Lebanon
item.description: Israeli attacks intensify in southern Lebanon, with 552 killed since the ceasefire started on April 16. Medical personnel are among the casualties as the conflict continues to escalate.

item.title: 🇵🇱🇭🇺 Polish Ex-Minister Flees Hungary to US After PM Warning
item.description: Zbigniew Ziobro, former Polish justice minister accused of leading an organized criminal enterprise, fled to the US after Hungary's new PM said the country would not protect people wanted elsewhere.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇮🇶 Israel Operated Secret Military Base in Iraq During Iran War
item.description: Israel established a clandestine outpost in the Iraqi desert to support its air campaign against Iran, housing special forces and serving as a logistics hub. Israel launched airstrikes against Iraqi troops who nearly discovered it early in the war.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's Supreme Leader Missing and Silent as War Negotiations Continue
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei has not appeared publicly since being severely injured in a February airstrike that killed his father Ali Khamenei. Only AI-generated images and purported written messages have emerged, raising questions about who is actually running Iran.

item.title: 🛢️💰 Saudi Aramco Profit Jumps 25% as Pipeline Bypasses Hormuz Disruption
item.description: The world's largest oil company reported $32.5 billion in Q1 profit as it shifted exports to its East-West Pipeline running to the Red Sea. Brent crude stands at $103.91/barrel, below war highs but still elevated from pre-war $70 levels.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Jailed Iranian Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi hospitalized after medical crisis
item.description: The Iranian activist and Nobel Peace Prize winner was transferred to a hospital after collapsing in prison over a week ago. Her family had been pleading for proper medical care.

item.title: 🇱🇻🚁 Latvian Defense Minister Resigns After Drone Incursions
item.description: Prime Minister Evika Silina requested the resignation of Defense Minister Andris Spruds, saying he had lost her trust and "that of the public" following drone violations of Latvian airspace.

item.title: 🇵🇱🔍 Drone with Cyrillic Markings Found Near Polish-Russian Border
item.description: A drone with Cyrillic markings was discovered near the Polish-Russian border, adding to concerns about foreign intelligence activities in the region.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇸 Kremlin Expects US Envoys Witkoff and Kushner 'Quite Soon'
item.description: Peace talks will not move forward until Ukraine pulls its forces from Donbas, Kremlin aide Yuri Ushakov said. The comments came as Russia continued attacks despite a declared ceasefire.

item.title: 🇹🇷🚀 Turkey Touts Propellant Breakthrough for Yildirimhan Long-Range Ballistic Missile
item.description: Turkey announced a significant advancement in solid propellant technology for its Yildirimhan ballistic missile program, extending range and payload capabilities.

item.title: 🇭🇺🗳️ Hungary's New PM Apologizes to Those Wronged Under Orban
item.description: Hungary's new prime minister issued a formal apology to citizens who suffered under Viktor Orban's authoritarian rule, marking a sharp break from the previous government.

item.title: 🇸🇾⚖️ Atef Najib Faces at Least 10 Charges in Landmark Syria Trial
item.description: The former Syrian intelligence officer and cousin of Bashar al-Assad faces prosecution for crimes against humanity in a landmark trial following the fall of the Assad regime.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇦🇷 US-China Telescope Dispute Intensifies in Argentina and Chile
item.description: Competition between Washington and Beijing for astronomical research capabilities has intensified across South America, with new telescope installations becoming proxy battlegrounds.

item.title: 🇮🇳🗳️ Modi's BJP Wins Election in West Bengal for First Time
item.description: India's ruling party achieved a historic victory in West Bengal state elections, a longtime stronghold of opposition parties, marking a significant shift in the country's political landscape.

item.title: 🇭🇰🕵️ Hong Kong Dissident Nathan Law on China Spies in UK: 'We're Not Surprised'
item.description: The pro-democracy activist responded to revelations about Chinese intelligence operations in Britain, saying the dissident community had long suspected such activities.

item.title: 🇮🇷📈 Food Inflation Hammers Households in War-Hit Iran
item.description: Iranian families struggle with soaring food prices as economic pressures mount from the ongoing conflict with the United States and international sanctions.

item.title: 🇲🇦🇺🇸 Missing US Soldier Recovered in Morocco
item.description: A US soldier who had been reported missing during a joint training exercise in Morocco has been recovered, authorities confirmed.
